module Acme.Users (firstUser) where

import Data.List (sort)

firstUser :: [User] -> User
firstUser = head . sort

module Acme.Users (pickUser) where

pickUser :: [User] -> Int -> User
pickUser xs i = xs !! i

module Acme.Users (lookupUser) where

import qualified Data.Map.Strict as Map
import Data.Maybe (fromJust)

lookupUser :: Map.Map UserId User -> UserId -> User
lookupUser m i = fromJust (Map.lookup i m)

module Acme.Users (firstUser, lookupUser) where

import qualified Data.Map.Strict as Map
import Data.List (sort, uncons)

firstUser :: [User] -> Maybe User
firstUser = fmap fst . uncons . sort

lookupUser :: Map.Map UserId User -> UserId -> Maybe User
lookupUser m i = Map.lookup i m

module Acme.Users.Internal (unsafeHead) where

unsafeHead :: [a] -> a
unsafeHead = head
